description_long: This is a thick hardcover book with a beige cover featuring a repeating pattern of numbers in the background. The front cover displays a green technical illustration of a surveyor's tripod instrument, giving it a scholarly and technical appearance. The book's edges are slightly worn, suggesting frequent use or age. The spine is clearly labeled with the book's title in bold black text, making it easily identifiable on a shelf. The cover appears to be made of a textured material, likely paperboard with a printed paper overlay. The book is substantial in size and would be commonly found in academic or professional urban environments.
description: A thick, beige hardcover book with a green technical illustration and bold black title text, showing signs of wear and a textured cover.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the green technical illustration and the full title text, with the book's thickness apparent from the bottom edge.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the thickness and the edge of the cover, with the title text partially visible along the spine.
description_view_2: The back edge and part of the cover are visible, with the title text upside down and the illustration partially seen.
description_view_3: The spine is fully visible, displaying the bold black title text and the textured surface of the cover.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a green technical drawing of a surveyor's tripod instrument, rendered in a simple, schematic style. The background is filled with a subtle grid of numbers, giving the cover a technical and academic feel.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is beige with bold black text displaying the book's title and edition. The design is simple and functional, with no decorative elements.
